title: Fix congress UI roster/avatar status filter

log.context: Fix congress UI roster/avatar status filter

- **Line 2010 (Fix 2):** Fired pool filter now accepts both `'severance'` and `'ineligible'` statuses

**Git:** Committed as `cd013f8` and pushed to `bigclungus/clung.us` main.
